theScene: As you keep traveling deeper and deeper into the Caverns, the rocky walls around you gradually appear less natural, instead looking to be carved and worn away by age, leaving you pondering whose handiwork this stonecutting can be attributed to... but all the more so wondering which way you should now go, the web of tunnels around you looking no less labyrinthine than the galleries you have been traversing so far...

However, before you can decide on which of the many available paths to take, you hear something approach very quickly and rather... squelchily? Then, a moment later, faster than you can react, a red blur speeds out of the darkness and bounces off you with a gooey thud that makes you stagger backwards!
Quickly recovering from the abrupt impact, you stare at the unexpected encounter, and quickly identify your 'ambusher' as a panicking, fearful, shaking Perpetua!
She snaps out of her rambling tizzy as she recognizes you, freezing in stupefaction while her widened eyes narrow in focus.
There's a dramatic pause as she stares up at you from her rather diminutive height, as if trying to process that you're actually in front of her.
Then she suddenly gives you a glomping pounce, tightly wrapping her arms around you as she lets her emotions spill out of her quivering jiggly frame all at once!

Uwaaaaaaaaa!!! F-Finally someone I know! I-I-I d-don't even know {i}how long{/i} I-I've been lost down here! This place doesn't make any sense and it's full of scary things and matango bullies! And it's dark and damp and cave water is so {i}gross{/i}! You-

Belatedly, she realizes that she's been clinging to you and having quite the demonstrative emotional moment, prompting her to leap away from you as quickly as her frantic outburst started, the prideful slime girl embarrassedly doing her best to recompose herself and salvage some dignity.
Her thoughts visibly racing, she hurriedly fishes for what to say next, her flustered expression then switching to an all-too-familiar gloating one with lightning-fast speed as she exclaims.
I mean- Mwahaha! {i}FOOL!{/i} You fell {i}hook, line, and sinker{/i} for my clever ruse! To- uh, {i}lower your guard!{/i}
She dramatically points at you with a smug grin, silence following her boastful 'reveal', until you can't help but deadpan back.
...Then your next step was to reveal that plan?
I- Uh- That- Sh-Shut up! You can't pretend to understand my- uh- my {i}masterful scheming{/i}, and- I've had a long day, okay!? Days? Whatever!

In a heartbeat, her face then splits into a confident, mischievous grin as she raises her arms in an aggressive posture, the atmosphere suddenly shifting in a way that unambiguously conveys that your nemesis wants a rematch {i}here and now{/i}!
But nevermind that! With you here, {i}mwahahaha{/i}, I can finally enact my {i}devious revenge{/i}! Prepare now to face your gooey doom, {i}hero{/i}!
...Then she abruptly stops mid-rush and starts freaking out all over again, frantically waving her arms.
{i}A-Actually,{/i} I just remembered: this is not the time or place for this! {i}W-We gotta run!{/i}
{i}Because {b}Amy{/b} keeps chasing after me and will be here any moment!{/i}
Nodding in understanding, Perpetua crosses her arms under her small chest with a huff of frustration.

Yeah, I {i}know!{/i} B-But this is more urgent! We can have our fated climactic battle that will shatter this stupid mountain {i}after{/i} we get the {i}heck{/i} out of here! Preferably {i}before{/i} Amy finds us!
Perpetua blinks in surprise before erupting in laughter at your question.
Pffffthahaha! What? No! What kind of future Demon Queen would be afraid of {i}ghosts?!{/i}
Her laughter dies off, echoing dramatically through the tunnels around while she gives you a confident, smug smile.

I mean, I'm not royalty or anything, but I'm gonna work my way to the {i}top{/i}, one epic feat of villainy at a time! And you're one of the stepping stones to this grand goal of mine! ...And also, for that matter, those 'ghosts' you mention are-
Suddenly, she starts panicking again mid-ramble, recalling that there was something apparently dire going on.
W-Wait, hold on- Now's not the time for this! W-We really gotta go before Amy gets here!
Ye- {b}NO!{/b} J-Just shut up, dummy! W-We're rivals! And we have more important things to deal with! Amy could be here {i}any second{/i}!
Perpetua exhales a deep, frustrated breath, and looks like she's about to shoot back another cutting reply when, unexpectedly, she looks aside in puzzlement.
She's-! ...Actually, I'm not even sure {i}what{/i} she is or if Amy is really her name... It was just kind of a feeling, I guess? Huh...

As if on cue, the sound of claws clicking and scratching against stone then echoes down one of the nearby tunnels, making Perpetua freeze for a moment in refreshed panic before fearfully peering down each of the tunnels, fruitlessly trying to discern which one 'Amy' is coming from. With the darkness and echoes playing tricks on your senses, it feels like she could be {i}anywhere{/i}, the sensation redoubling your nemesis' agitation.

As if in response, an odd shrieking coo reverberates across the tunnels, making all the hairs on your body stand on end as a chill runs down your spine. Closer and closer, the shuffling, grating sound draws nearer, gradually slowing down to a methodical, predatory pace; a slow, almost hypnotic clicking rhythm... Until it suddenly stops, leaving a tense eerie silence hanging in the air.

Both your minds racing, you and Perpetua look at each other in helpless puzzlement, wondering what you should do... when a gentle hiss emanates from right above you, making the two of you whip your gazes upwards just in time to see a white blur leap off the ceiling, the startling surprise feeling like it's going to make your heart burst straight out of your chest as Amy lands a mere few feet from you, leaving Perpetua squealing in terror.

Gracefully alighting on all fours, the monstrous woman stays perfectly still, her smooth mask-like face peering at you for a moment, slowly tilting while her tentacled hair writhes slowly. Set within her inhuman visage, two almost unnoticeable keen violet eyes widen with slight curiosity, a slight hiss emanating from the mouthless being while her long tail sways back and forth slowly, her sleek stark-white body reminiscent of porcelain.

Perpetua looks between the two of you, slowly backing off until she's all but huddling behind your legs, her panic slightly de-escalating as she notices that Amy's focus seems to be remaining exclusively on you for now. On that note, despite her unnerving appearance, you can't quite shake off the feeling that the... creature's name is definitely 'Amy', despite her not having said a single word...

As Amy sits up on her hind legs with a bird-like chirp, her long tail coiling loosely on the floor, Perpetua recoils further in your shadow, oozing herself even smaller while the strange monster girl merely continues staring at you intensely, her narrow eyes curving like a crescent moon while her mouthless expression remains impossible to interpret. Is she being friendly? Toying with you? Waiting to see what you'll do? Or-

Suddenly, with a resounding crack, the part of Amy's face where a person's mouth would normally be splits open horizontally across her mask-like visage, her jaw practically unhinging in the process. While you can't help but stare in silent awe, the lower part of her jaw then proceeds to part like porcelain mandibles, letting {i}five long squirming pale purple tongues{/i} slither out of her mouth, each drooling a toxic-looking violet saliva.

Locked in place at the sight, you note that the long tongues are moving rather... invitingly? Amy lets out what seems to be a seductive purr, occasionally making tempting stroking motions in the air, her lingual appendages usually sticking to the gaps between her lower and upper jaws when they aren't wrapping around each other as they undulate. All the while, Perpetua stays frozen behind you, anxiously waiting for you to act...
Offer your cock to Amy's writhing tongues.
'Oh, sweet goddess, what the {i}FUCK{/i} is that thing?!'

You turn tail and immediately dash down one of the tunnels in an attempt to make a break for it, Amy letting out a hiss of surprise behind you as her mouth seals back shut while Perpetua finds herself once more looking around in aimless panic.
Wh-Wha-? Hey, you {i}jerk{/i}, y-you can't abandon me here alone! You're supposed to be the {i}hero{/i}!

...Is it just you, or is her voice getting closer? Turning back, you see Perpetua chasing after you as fast as her blobby lower body allows her to while the quadruped monster girl trails right behind her with a droning, ominous shriek! Looks like the hunt is on!

Eager to put as much distance between you and Amy as you can, you look back ahead and pick up the pace, but to your surprise, Perpetua manages to fling herself onto your back, firmly latching onto you like a gooey backpack! In the process, her squelchy weight almost knocks you to the floor, nearly stopping you both dead in your tracks, though you manage to make a stumbling recovery and keep running while she smugly snickers.
It's the villain's job to slow the hero down.♪
{i}Now run faster, she's gaining on us!{/i}

Looks like you'll have no choice but to bear with your intrusive nemesis: with Amy catching up fast, you definitely don't have time to try and throw her sticky body off, giving you no other option but to grit your teeth and keep running!

You turn tail and immediately pick Perpetua up in your arms as you dash down one of the tunnels in an attempt to make a break for it, Amy letting out a hiss of surprise behind you as her mouth seals back shut while your squishy rival sputters.
Wh-What the heck do you think you're doing!? I'm your nemesis, you can't just {i}pick me up{/i} like this-!
However, with Amy trailing right behind the two of you and letting out a droning, ominous predatory shriek, Perpetua is quick to completely drop any attempt at an argument.
HGCK- {i}Okay, run faster, she's gaining on us!{/i} {size=-10}Also thanks.{/size}

Oozing around your body, Perpetua firmly latches onto you like a gooey backpack, leaving your arms free as you keep running as fast as you can, the sound of Amy rapidly catching up behind you leaving your heart racing!

Speeding down the cavern tunnels, you frantically try to get away from the chasing Amy while Perpetua is practically screaming straight into your ear in panic, your confused headlong dash leaving you little time to think about where exactly you should be running to, especially as you can hear Amy rushing {i}right behind you{/i}, ready to pounce! Time to dodge!

Despite a spirited feinting attempt, Amy slams squarely into you and Perpetua, sending you both sprawling to the floor while the ivory huntress makes a nimble recovery and prowls forward with what sounds like a chirruping giggle, your slime baggage meanwhile managing to get up first and immediately bolting down a tunnel.
Go get her, [ThePlayerName], i-it's your duty as the hero! Try and buy me time to escape! M-Maybe I'll find help!
When you stand up, Perpetua is already long gone and Amy is drawing near, fully aware you won't be able to run from her anymore. Looks like there is no longer any choice but to face her head-on...

Amy sails past you with a playful chirp as you leap to the side, dodging her jumping form then sprinting down another nearby tunnel in your scrambling effort to get away, Perpetua meanwhile clinging tightly to you as she continues to wail while Amy quickly reorients herself and resumes her chase.
You're not even sure where you're going, but any direction away from your pursuer can only be good! With a branching path up ahead, you must quickly decide which one to go down!
Every hair on your body stands on edge as you hear Amy right behind you, ready to pounce once more!
Once again, you manage to dodge out of the way of Amy's tackle, buying you a few precious moments to keep running while the still panicking Perpetua frantically pats your back in moral support.
Good job! Now {i}go go go go!{/i}
You find yourself back at the same branching path as before. Where to go now!?

You careen down the center path, stumbling up and down across the uneven ground, your heart thrumming in your chest as Amy stays close behind... And as you exit through another tunnel, you realize with a sinking feeling that you're back where you started, the winding path seeming to have just pointlessly looped around, giving your pursuer the time to catch up with you!

You hurry down the left tunnel, and follow its winding path with Amy in hot pursuit, your heart pounding in your chest as you desperately look around for any glimmer of daylight showing a way out of the Caverns, the fast-moving Amy gaining ground on you every second while you again find yourself at a split, once more requiring you to take a gamble on which of the upcoming paths to take!
You run through the left passageway, but as you exit through another tunnel, you realize that the confusingly maze-like galleries have brought you back right where you started!
You run through the right passageway and find yourself in a large chamber with more paths to take, at which point you realize that Amy somehow isn't chasing you anymore!
... as Perpetua is kind enough to point out.

You hurry down the right tunnel and follow its twisting passageways with Amy hot on your trail, your heart hammering in your chest as you frantically try to find your way out of the Caverns, rushing down another tunnel in search of an exit... But where to go exactly!?
You run through the right passageway, but as you barrel down another tunnel, you find out to your dismay that you've just been running around in circles, going back right where you started!
You run through the left passageway, and find yourself in a large chamber with more paths to take, at which point you realize that Amy somehow isn't chasing you anymore!
... as Perpetua is kind enough to point out.

You both let out sighs of relief and start studying the paths in front of you, but your peace is short-lived as Amy's playful chirp echoes disquietingly down the left tunnel, sending a shiver of renewed alarm through your spine... Th-The right tunnel! Sh-She didn't make any noise there, so that's {i}definitely{/i} the right way.

As you hurry down the right passage, Amy immediately ambushes you and slams into you and Perpetua, sending you both sprawling to the floor! While she prowls forward with what sounds like a giggle, Perpetua manages to get up first and immediately bolts down a tunnel!
Go get her, [ThePlayerName], i-it's your duty as the hero! Try and buy me time to escape! M-Maybe I'll find help!
When you stand up, Perpetua is already long gone and Amy is drawing near, fully aware you won't be able to run from her anymore. Looks like there is no longer any choice but to face her head-on...

You run through the left passageway, but end up immediately tumbling down a hole and sliding right back where you started, unhurt but dizzy, though Perpetua hurriedly shakes you out of your confusion as she screams.
You run through the center tunnel, and hear Amy hiss with disappointment as she emerges from the right passageway behind you, resuming her chase!
Ahhhhh! She's gaining on us! {i}Run faster!{/i}

You proceed to do so, and though your path discouragingly leads to a large antechamber with {i}more{/i} tunnels branching out of it, your heart soars as you spot an archway bearing an inscription that reads 'To the Capital'! Promptly, Perpetua leaps off of you and hurries down the marked passageway, her previous fear vanishing as she lets out a celebratory echoing laugh.
Mwahaha! Finally, I can see the exit! [ThePlayerName], you fool, you'll never stop me!

While she seems to have conveniently forgotten all about the mad scramble you just went through, you cautiously glance back and see Amy calmly sitting at the tunnel exit, the strange monster girl chirping in somehow happy acknowledgement of her defeat before bounding back into the Caverns, letting you follow after Perpetua's laughing trail as she travels towards the exit, looking quite keen to get out of this place.

Ah, well, don't worry, tactless nemesis of mine! I'm sure you can go back and sort things out later!
For now, the last one out is a moldy blueberry!

She immediately bounces down a tunnel with a maniacal laugh, prompting you to follow after her... And though you can't help but have reservations concerning her pathfinding abilities, you are pleasantly surprised to find that she seems to be going the right way, as she is keen to confirm with a gloating titter.
